<objective>
Component guidance, rule enforcement, and API reference for @capillarytech/cap-ui-library. Auto-detects Cap UI projects via package.json. Enforces rules (no raw HTML, no inline CSS, use design tokens) with auto-fix suggestions. Provides phased loading: quick reference always available, detailed API loaded on demand, MCP fallback for unlisted components.

Phases:

- detect: Check package.json for @capillarytech/cap-ui-library, extract and compare version to documented v8.2.10
- enforce: Scan code for violations (raw HTML, inline CSS, hardcoded values, deprecated components) and suggest auto-fixes (optional)
- assist: Answer component usage questions using SKILL.md quick reference (optional)
- lookup: Load detailed API from references/component-api.md or fall back to MCP for unlisted components (optional)
  </objective>
